description_long: This restaurant features a long, rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof that provides shade to an outdoor dining area lined with palm trees. The main facade is open, revealing a series of tables and chairs arranged neatly along the length of the building, suggesting a focus on al fresco dining. The floor appears to be wooden or wood-patterned, adding warmth to the overall aesthetic. The roof is a solid, light-colored slab with two visible vent structures, and the building is bordered by a row of evenly spaced palm trees, enhancing its tropical or resort-like ambiance. The interior is partially visible, with the main dining area extending under the roof, and a red carpet or runner leading into the space. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor integration.
description: A long, modern restaurant with a flat roof, open facade, and outdoor seating shaded by palm trees, featuring a warm wooden floor and minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open dining area with tables, chairs, palm trees, and a red carpet leading inside under the flat roof.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the row of palm trees and the length of the flat roof, with the open facade partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid back wall and the full length of the roof, with palm trees peeking over the top.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the palm trees and the open dining area beneath the roof.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is open and inviting, with a flat, overhanging roof providing shade to a row of outdoor tables and chairs. Palm trees line the edge, creating a tropical atmosphere, while the wooden flooring adds warmth and texture. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
